title: Unique Party 72645 - 23cm Gingham Easter Paper Plates, Pack of 8
features: Pack of 8 Gingham Easter Party Plates
Square paper plates measure approximately 23cm x 23cm (9" x 9")
Ideal for serving hot or cold food at an Easter party or Easter egg hunt
Disposable plates make cleaning up quick and convenient
Combine with other Gingham Easter party supplies from Unique Party
